name: your-decomp
compiler: your compiler and exact flag line (shown to contributors in the prompt)
cppNote: optional language-mode note, e.g. how to signal C++ vs C
setup: clone {github} and follow CONTRIBUTING.md (toolchain + how to obtain the target binary)
readFirst: the docs a contributor should read before writing code
rules: any legal / originality rules for contributions
_note_claims: OPTIONAL and project-specific: only set claimsApi + claimsProxyTarget if you run a locking service. Omit both and the lock UI is hidden entirely. This is not part of the shipped viewer.
